title: Date Formatting Options
excerpt:

posts.author: Andrea (Andrea Voss)
posts.cookedHtml:
While internally we love the short date however professionally we would prefer to have the date show in the long text to appear in client communications.
For example, we want it to include the day of the week and appear as Monday, February 7 but instead it appears as Mon., Feb. 7.
